products.name: Maroon Zari Bloom Digital Silk Saree
products.description: A rich oxblood-maroon digital silk saree with an antique gold zari-style border, printed in a hand-painted floral bloom motif. Comes with an unstitched blouse piece.

products.name: Ivory Paisley Georgette Saree
products.description: A flowing ivory georgette saree with a delicate paisley trail, finished with a gold-tone lace border for a soft daytime festive look.

products.name: Sunflower Yellow Linen Saree
products.description: A breathable linen saree in sunny yellow with a woven-look ikat print, designed for effortless everyday elegance.

products.name: Emerald Bandhani Organza Saree
products.description: A sheer emerald organza saree printed with a classic bandhani-inspired dot pattern and a structured satin border.

products.name: Blush Pink Floral Cotton Saree
products.description: A soft blush pink cotton saree with a scattered floral print, perfect for daily wear and light office festivities.

products.name: Royal Blue Bridal Kanjivaram-Style Silk Saree
products.description: A statement royal blue silk saree in a Kanjivaram-inspired temple border print, woven with a rich gold pallu design for weddings.

products.name: Mustard Ikat Print Linen Saree
products.description: A textured mustard linen saree with a geometric ikat print, styled with a contrast maroon border.

products.name: Coral Chinnon Digital Print Saree
products.description: A coral chinnon saree with a watercolour-style abstract print and a soft fall for effortless drape.

products.name: Charcoal Grey Zari Border Organza Saree
products.description: A refined charcoal grey organza saree finished with a wide gold zari-style border, ideal for evening events.

products.name: Rani Pink Bridal Silk Saree
products.description: A vivid rani-pink bridal silk saree with an intricate temple-motif pallu and dense gold-tone detailing throughout.

products.name: Sea Green Handloom-Look Cotton Saree
products.description: A sea-green cotton saree replicating a handloom check weave, printed digitally for a crisp, breathable everyday drape.

products.name: Wine Ombre Digital Silk Saree
products.description: A wine-to-blush ombre silk saree with a printed floral vine border, designed to catch the light beautifully at festive gatherings.

products.name: Powder Blue Chanderi-Style Cotton Saree
products.description: A powder-blue cotton saree with a fine Chanderi-inspired sheen print and a delicate silver-tone border.

products.name: Deep Teal Peacock Motif Organza Saree
products.description: A deep teal organza saree with an intricately printed peacock feather motif pallu, bordered in antique gold.
